stories.headline: Thames Water lenders offer 'golden share' to head off nationalisation
stories.description: The water supplier's lenders are trying to prevent the company from being taken over by the Burnham government

stories.headline: Lebanon’s Joseph Aoun to meet Trump: What to expect
stories.description: The Lebanese president is seeking Washington’s support for his agenda, including diplomacy with Israel.

stories.headline: Can AI systems make moral decisions in war?
stories.description: As more militaries adopt AI technology into their kill chain, Al Jazeera asks if they are capable of moral judgement.

stories.headline: US strikes Iran for 10th night as tanker attacked
stories.description: Iran has attacked a tanker in the Strait of Hormuz, forcing its crew to abandon the ship.

stories.headline: ‘Critic to Israel’: Document reveals how Israel scrutinised global NGOs
stories.description: An internal government file obtained by Al Jazeera shows how Israel collected data on groups it suspected supported BDS.
